sigWerNormalizedGold: 你 好 ， 能 听 见 我 说 话 吗 ？
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 你 好 ， 能 听 到 我 话 吗 ？

sigWerErrors.reason: '听见' (hear) and '听到' (hear) are very close in meaning and often interchangeable in this context, so the meaning of the sentence is preserved.
Omitting '说' (speak) changes 'hear me speak' to just 'hear me', which slightly alters the meaning but does not derail the overall intent of the sentence.
